buildCommand: (cd apps/server && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json')); delete p.type; fs.writeFileSync('package.json',JSON.stringify(p,null,2));" && bun build src/app.ts --outfile ../../api/index.cjs --target node --format cjs && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json')); p.type='module'; fs.writeFileSync('package.json',JSON.stringify(p,null,2));") && cd apps/web && bun run build
